mapper.select: select role.`name` from sys_user_role user_role LEFT JOIN sys_role as role on role.id=user_role.role_id where user_role.user_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wf_process_instance
process_id, form_group, form_type, form_id, name, status, creator_id, creator, executor_id, executor, current_step_id, current_user_id, current_user_name, current_step_name, create_time, handled_steps, handled_users, org_id, auto_code, code, row_id,
#{processId}, #{formGroup}, #{formType}, #{formId}, #{name}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{creator}, #{executorId}, #{executor}, #{currentStepId}, #{currentUserId}, #{currentUserName}, #{currentStepName}, #{createTime}, #{handledSteps}, #{handledUsers}, #{orgId}, #{autoCode}, #{code}, #{rowId},
